rulings.Case Title: JERRY WAYNE KING VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Honeywell International, Inc.'S Person(S) Most Qualified And Custodian(S) Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, August 16, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the deposition of defendant Honeywell International, Inc.¿s person(s) most qualified and custodian(s) of records and request for production of documents is off calendar pursuant to the notice of plaintiff¿s death provided to the court. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: SHARON DUNN et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 16, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendants Kelly Moore Paint Company, Inc. and the Sherwin Williams Co.¿s motion for protective order and sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
